title: Four-Villa Pererenan Enclave with Private Pools, Up to Ten Bedrooms - Canggu
note: Book one villa or all four
blurb: A contemporary enclave of four self-contained villas near Pererenan Beach — two- and three-bedroom houses that book on their own or together for anywhere from one to ten bedrooms, each with a private entrance, its own pool, and teakwood-warmed open living.
detail:
This enclave gathers four private, two-storey villas behind their own entrances: two with two bedrooms and two with three. Because each is fully self-contained, they let on their own or combine for any configuration from a single bedroom up to ten, sleeping as many as twenty guests. It is a layout made for extended families and larger groups who want to stay close while keeping a measure of independence, with separate front doors, kitchens, and pools throughout.

The four houses share a calm, uniform design — minimalist interiors over polished concrete, softened everywhere by sustainably grown teakwood in the furniture, pool decks, window frames, stair rails, and vaulted roof beams. Each centres on an open living and dining room that opens to the air or seals into cooled comfort, with an integrated kitchen and breakfast bar. Master bedrooms take king beds, balconies, and en-suites with twin basins and a free-standing tub; guest rooms have queen beds and their own bathrooms.

Every villa has its own swimming pool, between seven and eight and a half metres, edged by a teakwood deck and beanbag loungers amid flowering trees and trailing greenery. Daily breakfast, WiFi, and a team of villa supervisor, butlers, and night security are included, with a private chef on request. Pererenan Beach and its surf sit a short drive away, alongside the neighbourhood's cafés and beach bars.
